## What you can do with this document  
  
You can get information about the hotel's general description, location, amenities, and facilities. You can also answer guest questions about policies (check-in/out, cancellation, pets, accessibility), pricing behavior and seasonality, and meeting or event spaces. Use the FAQ section to respond to specific guest queries.  
---  
  
# Hotel Description  
  
## Hotel General Description:  
The hotel is located in United Kingdom.  
	 - The hotel has a four-star rating.  
	 - It is a medium-sized hotel with 76 rooms.  
  
## Hotel Extended Description:  
  
	-Property Name:  
	Warwickshire park hotel kenilworth by belvilla  
  
	-General description :    
A charming country retreat located in the scenic Warwickshire countryside, just 15 minutes from historical attractions. Originally a coach house built in 1592, it offers spacious rooms with modern amenities, free Wi-Fi, and a welcoming bar and restaurant, making it an ideal spot for relaxation and events.  
  
	-Hotel features :  
	Its historic charm, being a former coach house built in 1592, which has been modernized while conserving its period features and character.  
  
	-User reviews :  
	* 2nd time of staying at the venue, very well liked place, mainly quiet and peaceful, would highly rec  
* Staff were amazing, very helpful, chef prepared off menu dish for the children, clean and comforta  
* Very clean, room was lovely with field view   
* Just what we always expect. very welcoming & friendly   
  
	-Countryside proximity :  
	A perfect country retreat to relax and unwind."   "located in scenic warwickshire countryside 15 minutes from historical warwick  
  
	-Gym information :  
	We also have 3 conference rooms, gym and we cater for weddings and events  
  
	-Restaurant information :  
	We also have the phantom coachman bar and restaurant." "our pub the phantom coachman features original oak beams, and serves a varied international menu and world wine list." "the informal restaurant offers lighter meals and a selection of beverages." "room service is available  
  
	-Meetings information :  
	We also have 3 conference rooms, gym and we cater for weddings and events  
  
	-Rooms information :  
	The large and airy rooms at warwickshire park hotel offer tea and coffee facilities. rooms also have a modern en suite bathroom with free toiletries, and some have scenic views  
  
	-Family amenities information :  
	Chef prepared off menu dish for the children  
  
  
  
## Hotel Stationality:  
This property does not have more demand on weekends  
	- In this property, when demand goes up, prices go up too  
	- In this property the high season goes: from the fortnight of 21 of May to the fortnight of 07 of October   
	- In this property the mean lead time is 40.869, with 80% of the users with lead time between 35.671 and 55.550  
	- This property is not closed on any period of the year  
	- In this property there is peak demand dates in: , the fortnight of 12 of February , the fortnight of 12 of March , the fortnight of 09 of April the fortnight of 19 of November

What is the cancellation policy at warwickshire park hotel kenilworth by belvilla? The Warwickshire Park Hotel Kenilworth by Belvilla offers fully refundable room rates that can be cancelled up to a few days before check-in, depending on the property's cancellation policy. Specific cancellation and prepayment policies vary according to accommodation type. Guests are advised to check the property's cancellation policy for the exact terms and conditions.. [Related terms: refund policy, booking cancellation, modify reservation, cancel rules, money back]  
  
Which payment options are accepted at warwickshire park hotel kenilworth by belvilla? warwickshire park hotel kenilworth by belvilla accepts the following payment methods: Warwickshire Park Hotel Kenilworth by Belvilla accepts the following payment methods: Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Diners Club, Discover, and Maestro. Please note that cash payments are not accepted at this property.. [Related terms: credit cards, accepted cards, cash payment, methods of payment, visa, mastercard]  
  
Are there any additional fees or taxes at warwickshire park hotel kenilworth by belvilla? Yes, please note the following charges: Yes, there are additional charges when booking a stay at Warwickshire Park Hotel Kenilworth by Belvilla. These include fees for extra beds, pets, parking, and breakfast. For children aged 3 to 14 years, an extra bed upon request costs £15 per child, per night. Pets are allowed with an additional charge of £15 per pet, per night. Self-parking is available for £7 per day. Buffet breakfast is offered at approximately £12.95 for adults and £7.95 for children. Please note that these fees are not included in the total price and must be paid separately during your stay. All extra beds are subject to availability. Service animals are exempt from pet fees. The above list may not be comprehensive, and fees and deposits may not include tax and are subject to change.. [Related terms: taxes, extra charges, tourist tax, resort fee, surcharges, hidden costs]  
  
Are pets allowed at warwickshire park hotel kenilworth by belvilla? Yes, pets are allowed at warwickshire park hotel kenilworth by belvilla. We allow your pets to stay at the hotel, with a charge of £10 per pet per night. All our rooms are dog friendly, and you can take your pet into the bar area. However, pets are not allowed in the restaurant.. [Related terms: dogs allowed, cats allowed, pet friendly, animal policy, dog friendly]

Is warwickshire park hotel kenilworth by belvilla wheelchair accessible? Yes, the property is wheelchair accessible. The hotel offers wheelchair accessibility with some limitations. It features a stair-free path to the entrance, well-lit pathways, and in-room accessibility in select rooms. However, upper floors are accessible only by stairs, and there is no accessible shuttle service available.. [Related terms: ramp access, elevator access, mobility friendly, step-free access]

Can you describe the rooms at warwickshire park hotel kenilworth by belvilla? Standard Twin Room: A seating area with a flat-screen TV, a desk and a private bathroom are offered in this twin room. The unit has 2 beds.  
Deluxe Family Room: A seating area with a flat-screen TV, a desk and a private bathroom are provided in this spacious family room. The unit offers 3 beds.  
King Room: A seating area with a flat-screen TV, a desk and a private bathroom are offered in this spacious double room. The unit has 1 bed.  
Double Room: A seating area with a flat-screen TV, a desk and a private bathroom are featured in this spacious double room. The unit offers 1 bed.  
Standard Single Room Shared: The single room provides heating, as well as a shared bathroom featuring a shower. The single room features carpeted floors, a seating area with a flat-screen TV with satellite channels, a tea and coffee maker, a wardrobe, as well as a safe deposit box. The unit offers 1 bed.  
One-Bedroom Apartment: A seating area with a flat-screen TV, a desk and a private bathroom are featured in this apartment. The unit offers 3 beds.  
Standard Family Room: A seating area with a flat-screen TV, a desk and a private bathroom are available in this family room. The unit has 2 beds.  
Standard Double Room with Shared Bathroom: A seating area with a flat-screen TV, a desk and a shared bathroom are offered in this spacious double room. The unit has 1 bed.  
Economy Single Room: The unit has 1 bed.  
. [Related terms: room details, accommodation types, suite features, room layout]

Are there additional services or products available at warwickshire park hotel kenilworth by belvilla? The Warwickshire Park Hotel Kenilworth by Belvilla offers several upsell and cross-selling options. Guests can opt for a one-course dinner in addition to their stay. The hotel provides various room types, including Standard Double/King Rooms, Deluxe Double King Rooms, and Family Rooms, catering to different guest needs. Additionally, the hotel offers breakfast services, which can be included in the stay package.. [Related terms: extras, add-ons, additional services, experiences]  
  
Are there any restaurants near warwickshire park hotel kenilworth by belvilla? Several restaurants are located within a short driving distance from the Warwickshire Park Hotel Kenilworth by Belvilla. The Falcon is approximately a 4-minute drive away. The Dictum of Kenilworth and Pomeroys are both about a 9-minute drive from the hotel. The Queen & Castle is reachable in approximately 7 minutes by car. The Barn Restaurant is around an 8-minute drive away. Additionally, The Almanack is about an 8-minute drive from the hotel. These establishments offer a variety of dining options for guests staying at the hotel.. [Related terms: local dining, places to eat nearby, food recommendations, nearby cafes]  
  
What local activities are available near warwickshire park hotel kenilworth by belvilla? Guests at Warwickshire Park Hotel Kenilworth by Belvilla can enjoy nearby activities such as hiking and practicing their swing at the nearby golf course. Additionally, the hotel has a garden for guests to relax in.. [Related terms: things to do, sightseeing, excursions, attractions, events]  
  
What are the points of interest near warwickshire park hotel kenilworth by belvilla? The Warwickshire Park Hotel Kenilworth by Belvilla is situated in a serene countryside setting, offering convenient access to several notable attractions. Kenilworth Castle, a historic site, is approximately 4.4 km away. Warwick Castle, another significant landmark, is about 5.5 miles from the hotel. The National Motorcycle Museum is located 7 miles away. Shakespeare's Houses & Gardens are approximately 10 miles from the hotel. Harvard House is 11.1 miles away. The Royal Shakespeare Theatre is situated 11.2 miles from the hotel. Holy Trinity Church is 11.4 miles away. Cadbury World is located 13 miles from the hotel. Winterbourne House and Garden are approximately 13.5 miles away. The Thinktank Birmingham Science Museum is also 13.5 miles from the hotel. The National SEA LIFE Centre Birmingham is 14.2 miles away. LEGOLAND Discovery Centre Birmingham is 14.3 miles from the hotel. The Pen Museum is 14.4 miles away. The River Avon is approximately 14.5 miles from the hotel. The World Rugby Hall of Fame is 16.4 miles away. Additionally, the hotel is conveniently located just 15 minutes from the University of Warwick and 20 minutes from Birmingham International Airport.. [Related terms: landmarks, tourist spots, monuments, must see places]  
  
Does warwickshire park hotel kenilworth by belvilla offer airport shuttle services? Write here the answer. [Related terms: airport pickup details, shuttle schedule, transfer cost]  
  
What are the parking details at warwickshire park hotel kenilworth by belvilla? There is free on-site parking. Disabled parking is also available on a first come, first served basis.. [Related terms: parking cost, parking availability, valet price, public parking nearby]  
  
What public transport options are near warwickshire park hotel kenilworth by belvilla? The Warwickshire Park Hotel Kenilworth by Belvilla is accessible via public transport. The nearest bus stop, Honiley Court Hotel, is approximately 100 meters from the hotel. From there, travelers can take the Flexibus service to Upper Parade, followed by the 11 bus to Abbey Fields, with a total journey time of about 1 hour and 5 minutes. Additionally, the hotel is within a short driving distance to several train stations: Berkswell Station (6.5 km), Tile Hill Station (8.47 km), and Lapworth Station (approximately 3.2 miles). These stations provide further connectivity to the surrounding areas.. [Related terms: nearest metro, bus stop, train station, getting around]
